recommendations.title: Charly
recommendations.overview: An experiment on a simpleton turns him into a genius. When he discovers what has been done to him he struggles with whether or not what was done to him was right.

recommendations.title: Lilies of the Field
recommendations.overview: An unemployed construction worker heading out west stops at a remote farm in the desert to get water when his car overheats. The farm is being worked by a group of East European Catholic nuns, headed by the strict mother superior, who believes the ma

recommendations.title: Duel at Diablo
recommendations.overview: In Apache territory, a supply Army column heads for the next fort, an ex-scout searches for the killer of his Native wife, and a housewife abandons her husband to rejoin her Apache lover's tribe.

recommendations.title: Soldier Blue
recommendations.overview: After a cavalry group is massacred by the Cheyenne, only two survivors remain: Honus, a naive private devoted to his duty, and Cresta, a young woman who had lived with the Cheyenne two years and whose sympathies lie more with them than with the US go

recommendations.title: Isle of Dogs
recommendations.overview: In the future, an outbreak of canine flu leads the mayor of a Japanese city to banish all dogs to an island used as a garbage dump. The outcasts must soon embark on an epic journey when a 12-year-old boy arrives on the island to find his beloved pet.

recommendations.title: Spies in Disguise
recommendations.overview: Super spy Lance Sterling and scientist Walter Beckett are almost exact opposites. Lance is smooth, suave and debonair. Walter is… not. But what Walter lacks in social skills he makes up for in smarts and invention, creating the awesome gadgets Lance

recommendations.title: Memoirs of a Geisha
recommendations.overview: In the years before World War II, a penniless Japanese child is torn from her family to work as a maid in a geisha house.

recommendations.title: The Wind Rises
recommendations.overview: A lifelong love of flight inspires Japanese aviation engineer Jiro Horikoshi, whose storied career includes the creation of the A-6M World War II fighter plane.

recommendations.title: Kelly's Heroes
recommendations.overview: A misfit group of World War II American soldiers goes AWOL to rob a bank behind German lines.

recommendations.title: Mediterraneo
recommendations.overview: Greek Sea, World War II. An Italian ship leaves a handful of soldiers in a little island; their mission is to spot enemy ships and to hold the island in case of attack. The village of the island seems abandoned and there isn't a single enemy in sight
